content: To access pro features, start free 30-day trial of {{organizationName}} {{license}} Edition.

comment.text: This translation key is used for the instructional header that prompts users to start a free 30-day trial of a specific {{organizationName}} {{license}} Edition to access pro features. It appears in a banner or dialog, instructing users on how to upgrade to a professional version of the platform.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The French sentence is grammatically broken and changes the meaning. 'L'accès aux outils professionnels, démarrez...' translates to 'Access to professional tools, start...', which is a comma splice that fails to express the conditional relationship 'To access... [do this]' present in the English source.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Pour accéder aux fonctionnalités professionnelles, démarrez un essai gratuit de 30 jours de l'édition {{organizationName}} {{license}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word order in Romanian is unnatural and grammatically incorrect regarding the variables. It currently reads 'trial of [organizationName] [license] Edition', which results in a broken phrase like 'trial of Company Enterprise Edition' in a way that doesn't flow correctly in Romanian syntax.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Pentru a accesa caracteristicile Pro, începeți perioada de încercare gratuită de 30 de zile pentru {{organizationName}} Ediția {{license}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'trial' has been translated as 'විමසුමක්' (vimasuwak), which means 'an inquiry' or 'a query'. In the context of a software trial, it should be 'අත්හදා බැලීමක්' (athhada baleemak).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: වෘත්තීය විශේෂාංග ලබා ගැනීමට, {{organizationName}} {{license}} සංස්කරණයේ නොමිලේ 30-දින අත්හදා බැලීමක් ආරම්භ කරන්න.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Edition' from the English text is missing in the Ukrainian translation, which changes the phrasing of the license type.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Щоб отримати доступ до професійних функцій, запустіть безплатну 30-денну пробну версію {{organizationName}} {{license}} Edition.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word order in Vietnamese incorrectly attaches '30 ngày' (30 days) to the organization/license name instead of the trial period, making it sound like a '30-day edition' rather than a '30-day trial'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Để truy cập các tính năng chuyên nghiệp, hãy bắt đầu dùng thử miễn phí 30 ngày phiên bản {{license}} {{organizationName}}.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word order in Albanian is incorrect, placing 'Edition' before the variables, which results in a nonsensical phrase 'Edition {{organizationName}} {{license}}'. In Albanian, the noun 'Edition' should follow the descriptors.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Për të aksesuar veçoritë profesionale, filloni provën falas 30-ditore të {{organizationName}} {{license}} Edition.
